creator: bileslav@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Olivier Certner from comment #35)

Hi Olivier! After replacing the RX 580 with RX 6400, the crashes on my end stopped. Well, there were a few, but that is obviously irrelevant, because before it happened several times a day. In other words, with the RX 6400, everything is fine for me with both drm-515-kmod and drm-61-kmod. Since I sold the the RX 580, I can not test it with drm-61-kmod, unfortunately. Thank you.
